description:
Several WASM entry points accept unvalidated input from JavaScript:
- handle_dt1() (lib.rs line 879): now_ms could be NaN, negative, or Infinity
- Multiple methods accept &[u8] without size validation beyond minimal checks
- No validation that fx data slices match expected sizes (lines 1140-1142)

Fix: Add validation at the WASM boundary for:
- Timestamps: reject NaN/Infinity/negative values
- Byte slices: validate exact expected sizes, return descriptive JsError
- Parameter values: validate MIDI 0-127 range where applicable
title: Validate WASM boundary inputs (timestamps, byte slices)
